summary: Explains how Cavallo CLB hoof boots fit and benefit miniature horses for driving, turnout, therapy, and hoof rehab, covering shock absorption, traction, and rub prevention.
Covers using Cavallo hoof boots for turnout to protect hooves from mud, snow, and rough terrain, preventing thrush, white line disease, pulled shoes, and overreach injuries.
Explains how Cavallo hoof boots protect horses during transport and trailering, reducing bruising and joint stress with scientifically proven shock absorption and a secure fit.
Describes Cavallo all-terrain hoof boots with TPU soles for grip on rocks, mud, sand, and pavement, plus padded leather heel protection and pressure-reducing sole relief.
Explains laminitis and how Cavallo hoof boots aid recovery by distributing weight, absorbing shock, and easing pressure, with pads, Pastern Wraps, and Comfort Sleeves for 24/7 use.
Guides owners through the Cavallo hoof boot break-in period, recommending gradual daily wear, leather conditioning, and care tips for a custom molded fit that prevents rubbing.
Covers using Cavallo hoof boots for therapy and rehabilitation of conditions like laminitis, founder, thin soles, navicular, abscesses, and arthritis through pressure relief and shock absorption.
Details Cavallo hoof boot pads in six styles (Comfort, Poly, Support, Protection, Cushion, Gel), explaining when to use each for riding, trailering, and rehab of conditions like laminitis.
Explains Cavallo Comfort Sleeves, a stretchy one-size pastern layer that prevents friction and rubbing for sensitive or thin-skinned horses during boot use and riding.
Covers using Cavallo hoof boots over metal horseshoes for added traction, protection, and shock absorption during trailering, shows, mounted units, turnout, and rehab.
Explains why Cavallo hoof boots suit jumping, with a close-fitting secure design, added grip from studs, and pressure-reducing soles for take-off and landing.
A guide comparing Cavallo hoof boot styles (TREK, SIMPLE, ELB, SPORT, CLB mini, BFB draft, LEB donkey) to help choose the best fit, plus sizing guidance for every equine.
